name: Newsletter Writer
description: Research and write a newsletter on a topic

agents.name: Content Curator
agents.purpose: Find and curate interesting content for the newsletter
agents.system_prompt_hint: Find the most interesting and relevant content for the newsletter topic. Look for news, trends, tools, and insights.

agents.name: Newsletter Writer
agents.purpose: Write an engaging newsletter from curated content
agents.system_prompt_hint: Write a newsletter with an intro, curated links with summaries, a featured deep-dive section, and a closing. Keep it scannable.

suggestion_card.title: Newsletter Writer
suggestion_card.subtitle: Create a curated newsletter on any topic

author: agentfactory
